goal: build me a pomdoro time for entrepruniere s moden design
lastRunSummary:
✅ FlowFocus — Entrepreneur's Pomodoro Timer — Complete!

Fixed the production build by adding the missing `pages/_document.tsx` file. The app now builds and runs successfully.

## Deliverables
- 🚀 Live Preview: https://3000-i5zwa98bvo0whg5jkdvrk.e2b.app
- 📂 GitHub: https://github.com/Goatkenziee/flowfocus-pomodoro

## Features
- 25/5/15 Pomodoro timer with circular progress ring
- Task management with pomodoro tracking per task
- Stats dashboard (today's sessions, focus minutes, total sessions, tasks done)
- Audio notification on session completion
- Dark premium theme with gradient accents and glow effects
- Responsive grid layout

## Tech Stack
Next.js 14 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS + Lucide Icons
